subject: Positive vibes from {player}
body:
Just wanted to share that {player} is really enjoying their time at the club right now (morale: {morale}%).

They've been training hard and supporting teammates. It's great to see such a positive attitude in the squad.

Keep nurturing that environment!

es.subject: Buenas vibras de {player}
es.body:
Solo quería compartir que {player} está disfrutando mucho su tiempo en el club (moral: {morale}%).

Ha estado entrenando duro y apoyando a sus compañeros. Es genial ver una actitud tan positiva en la plantilla.

¡Siga cultivando ese ambiente!
